description.value: Mobile retail and service point with fold-out serving window. Built on Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis. Designed for mobile vending, café service, and merchandise display. Chassis designed and manufactured by Fernhay.
Fernhay eAV electric cutaway chassis — designed and manufactured by Fernhay

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Fully electric cutaway chassis platform. Includes powertrain, battery pack, frame, suspension, steering, and braking systems. Designed and manufactured by Fernhay.

description.value: Kiosk body with fold-up serving window — manufactured by EAVX

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Box body with fold-up service window/awning on curbside. Includes counter surface, overhead lighting, and weather seal.

description.value: Select interior layout configuration for the kiosk body

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: No interior layout. Empty kiosk shell for custom buildout or third-party installations.
Espresso machine mount, prep counter, sink with water tank, under-counter refrigerator mount, and service counter. Designed for mobile café and beverage service operations (Starbucks, Einstein's).
Adjustable display shelving, merchandise racks, point-of-sale counter, and integrated lighting. Designed for mobile retail and merchandise display operations.
Workbench, tool storage, and parts bins for mobile repair/service operations.

description.value: Select storage options for the kiosk body

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Locking overhead cabinets for supplies and inventory.
Standard white exterior finish. Included in base price.
Custom exterior color matched to customer specifications. Includes fleet branding color matching.

description.value: Select a charging solution for your vehicle

customization_option_basic_details__desc.value: Standard Level 2 AC charging unit for overnight depot charging. Ideal for fleet operations with predictable schedules.
DC fast charging unit enabling rapid charging at commercial depots. 80% charge in under 1 hour.
